title: GitOps Platform with ArgoCD
summary: Established GitOps workflows using ArgoCD for declarative Kubernetes deployments across environments.

content.value: Kubernetes deployments were applied manually via kubectl by multiple engineers, leading to configuration drift between environments. There was no audit trail and rollbacks required manual YAML edits.

Rolled out ArgoCD as the single deployment plane for all Kubernetes clusters. Every application was expressed as a Helm chart in a dedicated GitOps repo. ArgoCD continuously reconciled cluster state with Git, flagging and auto-healing any drift.

Implemented App-of-Apps patterns to manage 50+ microservices from a single repo. Progressive delivery with ArgoCD Rollouts enabled canary and blue-green strategies with automated analysis using Prometheus metrics.

Outcome: zero configuration drift across all clusters, full deployment audit trail in Git history, rollbacks reduced to a single git revert, and deployment frequency increased from weekly to multiple times daily.
